allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const e=fs.existsSync\('.env'\)?fs.readFileSync\('.env','utf8'\):''; console.log\('has BROWSERLESS_URL:', /BROWSERLESS_URL=/.test\(e\)\); console.log\('has BROWSERLESS_TOKEN:', /BROWSERLESS_TOKEN=/.test\(e\)\);")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\('count:',j.length\);for\(const c of j\)console.log\('  cmp',c.id,'status',c.status,'baseline file:',c.baseline?.file_path,'exists baseline img?'\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('data/sqlite.db', {readonly:true}\); const rows = db.prepare\('SELECT id, scenario_id, status, screenshot_paths_json FROM runs WHERE id IN \(168, 169\)'\).all\(\); for \(const r of rows\) { console.log\('run', r.id, 'scenario', r.scenario_id, 'status', r.status\); try { const arr = JSON.parse\(r.screenshot_paths_json\); console.log\('  slots:', arr\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('  bad json', r.screenshot_paths_json\); } }")
